I've seen ReversedWinds play, he doesn't even use a monitor. He visualizes the map in a detailed rendering, completely in his mind. He has a biological wallhack; his godlike perception highlights all enemies within light-years. His eyes are closed as his mouse gracefully swerves across the table, making immaculate twitches as he flicks from head to head. The bullets that escape his gun barrel are surgical; each making a deadly strike in between his opponent's eyes.

fl0m, i think they have 2 different ban options they can use, depending on the performance of players. like if you do too good, which is barely dying on certain rounds, and if you die almost every round. so one option is instant bans and the other is a cooldown to actually see if they are cheating to look deeper to stop false bans from happening. (NOT PASTA)

As I was making my lunch today, rinsing my rice, I looked at the rice sitting in water in the rice cooker and thought to myself. "You know what, my rice is like my streamer. Washed." Then I put some salt in and thought "I've seen this pug before." I also remembered Wookie doesn't wash his rice, and wondered why anyone would do that. But I figure if the 5 gifted must flow then there must be a washed streamer there to receive it and why not this one? Chat can we get some primers?

hi fl0m , protip here: your mouse has two buttons one on the left and one on the right, the left one is for shooting and the right one is for zooming in, when your crosshair is on the enemy you need to press the left mouse button, try doing that and you might finally get some kills, gl.

When was the last time you saw a player with such an ability and movement with all weapons? w3t_napkin puts the game in another level, and we will be blessed if we ever see a player with his skill and passion for the game again. Vitality breaks records. Spirit breaks records. w3t_napkin breaks the rules. You can keep your statistics. I prefer the magic.
